panels.title: Per-(child, style) bandit scores (current snapshot from child_profiles.preferences)
panels.description: Phase 0 reads voice_style_scores from the JSON column populated by JubuAdapter._update_voice_style_score_for_session. Once Phase 1 lands telemetry_events, the per-session score TRAJECTORY will get its own panel.

targets.rawSql: WITH style_rows AS (SELECT p.name AS child, p.age, k AS codename, (v->>'n')::int AS n, (v->>'score')::float AS score FROM child_profiles p, LATERAL jsonb_each(COALESCE(p.preferences::jsonb->'voice_style_scores', '{}')) AS j(k, v)) SELECT child, age, codename, n, score FROM style_rows ORDER BY child, codename

panels.title: Sessions per style (last 7 days, from conv_metadata)
panels.description: Reads style_codename out of conversations.conv_metadata. NULL means a session that ran before the dynamic-style telemetry landed.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(conv_metadata->>'style_codename', '(no style metadata)') AS codename, COUNT(*) AS sessions FROM conversations WHERE start_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

title: Voice Style — Bandit Scores & Selection Mix
